mark_phase2.angle: Imbalance-handling face-off — fix XGBoost, vary 9 imbalance strategies

anthony_phase2.angle: Multi-model family comparison — 6 algorithms + 3 ensembles on temporal split

mark_phase4.headline: Optuna 30 trials on 53-feat CatBoost moved test AUPRC by +0.0016; threshold calibration on the same default model moved test F1 by +0.0611. Where the operating-point lift comes from is *threshold*, not tuning.
